title: lithocarpus annamensis
intro: Lithocarpus annamensis, also known as the Anam Batu or Anam Batu Tree, is a species of tree in the beech family (Fagaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus annamensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
